select_when: A problem spans several causal layers and a single disciplinary frame keeps missing incentives, trade-offs, or second-order effects.
The team has many facts but they do not yet hang together into a usable theory of what is happening.
A recommendation needs multiple lenses checked against each other before committing to a single explanation.
Blind spots are likely because the current approach is trapped inside one specialist vocabulary.
avoid_when: The team is collecting model names as decoration but not translating them into concrete tests, comparisons, or decision pressure.
The problem is narrow enough that disciplined use of one strong model already explains the mechanism and action path.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the routing identity focused on cross-model integration, blind-spot reduction, and usable theory rather than on vague worldly-wise rhetoric.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 4 or import donor-shaped higher-order semantics in this coverage batch.
Kept the routing surface conservative so Layer 2B stays canonical and Waves 2 to 4 stay preview-only.
open_questions: Wave 4 candidacy stays observational only for this batch.

select_when.note: Select conditions stay close to the source activation language and are compressed only enough for routing use.

avoid_when.note: Avoid conditions preserve the source anti-patterns and misuse warnings with conservative normalization.

input_type.note: The typed input label is a reviewed routing compression of the source context.

output_type.note: The typed output label compresses the intervention shape implied by the raw source.

reasoning_types.note: Reasoning taxonomy labels are normalized onto the existing Layer 2B vocabulary.
